query:
SELECT 
  adsEnabled,
  adsLocalEnabled,
  adNetworkScripts IS NOT NULL AS hasScripts,
  JSON_LENGTH(adNetworkScripts) AS scriptSlotCount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.top_desktop')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS top_desktop_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.top_mobile')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS top_mobile_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.sidebar')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS sidebar_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.between_desktop')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS between_desktop_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.between_mobile')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS between_mobile_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.bottom_desktop')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS bottom_desktop_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.bottom_mobile')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS bottom_mobile_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.popup')) LIKE '%atOptions%' AS popup_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.native')) LIKE '%async%' AS native_ok,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(adNetworkScripts, '$.popup_frequency')) AS popup_frequency
FROM platform_settings WHERE id = 1;
